homepage.title: GROHE – Premium Bathroom Taps, Showers & Kitchen solutions
homepage.description: Discover GROHE’s premium bathroom and kitchen fittings – exceptional quality, benefit-driven technologies, award-winning design and smart water-saving innovations
homepage.text_excerpt:
GROHE – Premium Bathroom Taps, Showers & Kitchen solutions
Your browser does not support the video tag.
Showers that stay with you.
GROHE showers are more than just showers, they are an experience that stays with you.
For every space where water matters
From the serene sanctuary of the bathroom to the dynamic heart of the kitchen, we design solutions that elevate every experience with water. Discover precision-crafted products designed for life, delivering seamless integration for professionals while bringing Pure Freude an Wasser – the pure joy of water – to every home. This promise is built on our four core pillars: exceptional quality in fit, feel and finish, benefit-driven technology, award-winning design, and a deep commitment to impactful sustainability.

Our promise: “Pure Freude an Wasser”
What creates "Pure Freude an Wasser"? It's when Quality, Technology, Design and Sustainability come together. At the core of the GROHE brand are these four pillars:
Previous slide
Next slide
Quality
We craft products with exceptional fit, feel, and finish, ensuring quality that delivers lasting pure joy of water.
Technology
We enhance water experiences by innovating technologies that meet the needs of people worldwide.
Design
We create consumer-centric designs based on real insights that enable bespoke bathroom and kitchen spaces.
Sustainability
We deliver uncompromising experiences that minimise resource consumption along the value chain.
Quality
We craft products with exceptional fit, feel, and finish, ensuring quality that delivers lasting pure joy of water.
Technology
We enhance water experiences by innovating technologies that meet the needs of people worldwide.
Design
We create consumer-centric designs based on real insights that enable bespoke bathroom and kitchen spaces.
Sustainability
We deliver uncompromising experiences that minimise resource consumption along the value chain.
GROHE SPA: Wellbeing through water
Elevate your bathroom into a bespoke home spa, where water becomes the source of personal wellbeing. This is
Salus Per Aquam
– Wellbeing through water
– brought to life through GROHE SPA: Our most exclusive collection of award-winning designs, crafted from the finest materials and offering unparalleled customisation. This is the pinnacle of GROHE, created for those who seek to design truly unique wellness experiences.
Discover GROHE SPA
